title: cerbera manghas
intro: Cerbera manghas, also known as the sea mango or Calvaria tree, is a species of poisonous plant native to the coastal regions of the Indo-Pacific region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cerbera manghas include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, but it should be handled with caution due to its toxic nature.
